name: O.R.C. Wolf Spider
description: The O.R.C. Wolf Spider is the elite hunting version of the Wolf Spider in Grounded 2. It keeps the base predator's brutal pressure, but now applies it with much more oppressive consistency.
behavior: It patrols dark interior areas and O.R.C. points on short routes, waiting for the best line to engage. Once it fixes on a target, it almost never gives them a real pause.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and punishes tempo mistakes very hard. If you misread the lunge or the jump, it can restart the entire pressure loop in seconds.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually operates alone as the apex predator of its route, though it can overlap with other O.R.C. units in interior sections.
strategy: Spicy is still the best weakness and you never want to fight it cornered. Punish the end of the lunge and jump, but do not offer obvious hits in front of it because the counter comes out very fast.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 94. 5-Combo Bite: 125. Charged Lunge: 125. Jump Attack: 119. Counter Attack: 106.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A quick heavy bite used to begin close-range pressure.

abilities.name: 5-Combo Bite
abilities.description: It chains several bites in a row to punish any late block or slow recovery.

abilities.name: Charged Lunge
abilities.description: It crouches for a moment and then launches forward with heavy force.

abilities.name: Jump Attack
abilities.description: It leaps abruptly to land on the player and close space again.

abilities.name: Counter Attack
abilities.description: It snaps back immediately when it detects an overly obvious punish window in front of it.
